fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the Segment Interaction Language. This field will not be displayed in the Word attachment.

fields.name: Subject
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subject text. The text in the field is used as the subject in e-mails and Word documents.
